info.description: Each entry is one icon on the desktop. Set 'Action' to control what happens when it's opened: openFolder = Finder window, browserModal = browser popup, resumeModal = resume viewer, garmentDesignModal = garment gallery. Leave 'Action' empty and fill in 'Url' to make it a plain link.

backgroundColor.description: Background color for textModal. Any CSS color value, e.g. #ffffff or #1a1a2e

textColor.description: Text color for textModal. Any CSS color value, e.g. #111111 or #f0f0f0
